title: How to change the Text Description?
excerpt:
Hi, I’m looking to know how can I change this Text Description from “Write something or type / for more options” to anything I want, just like when you load templates and it gives you an idea of what to write there. 
Thi…

posts.author: niddLer (Joao Fernandes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m looking to know how can I change this Text Description from “Write something or type / for more options” to anything I want, just like when you load templates and it gives you an idea of what to write there.

This is what I have:

image_2023-01-17_094801085806×186 15 KB

This is what I want to accomplish:

image_2023-01-17_095328808870×290 24.7 KB

Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @niddLer! I am afraid currently we do not support this type of functionality - specifically customising those prompts in your doc templates. Whilst you can physically type the sentence out, it’s not possible to have that text appear then disappear once the user starts typing - the text will fixed there until deleted. If you’re happy to go ahead with that option (have users manually delete the prompts), I’d recommend going in that direction in the meantime

Sorry for the inconvenience!

posts.author: niddLer (Joao Fernandes)
posts.cookedHtml: Ok thank you, would be a good feature to add!
